
=== mode=plain stderr ===
SafeDep pmg dev (abcdef1) — SafeDep package manager guard
Colors — semantic text helpers
[INFO] Info message
[OK] Success message
[WARN] Warning message
[ERR] Error message
Badges — severity + semantic roles
Icon set — Unicode / ASCII / Agent side-by-side
Table — severity report with pre-styled Badge cells
Diff — naive unified diff with colored +/-
Console — value-typed escape hatch
[INFO] this goes to the global writer in the global mode
Renderable — custom types dispatched through tui.Print
lodash@4.17.0 — High: upgrade to 4.17.21
left-pad@1.0.0 — Low: no action required

Error        ✗          [ERR]      ERR:       
Warning      ⚠          [WARN]     WARN:      
Info         i          [INFO]     INFO:

INFO: captured; agent mode regardless of global
